initiatives.name: Southwest Corridor Equity Coalition (SWEC)
initiatives.description: Coalition of community organizations fighting displacement and advocating for equitable development in Southwest Portland through grassroots organizing, mutual aid, and community-led planning initiatives.

initiatives.name: Kalikasan Solidarity Org
initiatives.description: Organizing in solidarity with environmental defenders in the Philippines in their struggle for land and livelihood!

initiatives.name: 350PDX
initiatives.description: Grassroots climate justice organization building people power to tackle the root causes of climate chaos through mutual aid, direct action, and solidarity with frontline communities.

initiatives.name: OPAL Environmental Justice Oregon
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization building power for environmental justice and civil rights in low-income communities and communities of color through organizing, leadership development, and mutual aid. Their work focuses on transit justice, housing rights, and climate action while centering the voices of those most impacted by environmental racism.

initiatives.name: Revolution Rising PDX
initiatives.description: Grassroots collective building mutual aid networks and community power through direct action, political education, and solidarity organizing.

initiatives.name: Social Justice Action Center (SJAC)
initiatives.description: A community organizing space and mutual aid hub providing resources and support for grassroots movements and social justice initiatives in Portland. SJAC serves as a gathering place for organizing, skill-sharing, and building collective power.

initiatives.name: Critical Resistance PDX
initiatives.description: Portland chapter of Critical Resistance, a national grassroots organization working to abolish the prison industrial complex.

initiatives.name: The People's Store PDX
initiatives.description: Mobile mutual aid resourcing unhoused people on occupied Multnomah, Cowlitz, & Grand Ronde land.

initiatives.name: Don't Shoot PDX
initiatives.description: Black-led social justice organization focused on art, education, and mutual aid initiatives. Provides community resources through their Black Culture Library, art exhibitions, and direct action programs while advocating for civil rights and racial justice.

initiatives.name: SURJ PDX
initiatives.description: A chapter of Showing Up for Racial Justice fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through white anti-racist organizing in the Portland Metropolitan Area. Founded in 2013, they coordinate political education, direct action support, and solidarity networks while building power through racial justice education and accountable organizing in partnership with BIPOC-led organizations. Their work is guided by values including calling people in rather than calling out, taking risks and learning from mistakes, and organizing out of mutual interest.

initiatives.name: Black Food Sovereignty Coalition
initiatives.description: Coalition igniting Black and Brown communities to build food sovereignty, community wealth, and leadership within food systems. Operates programs including Come Thru Market, Grandma's Hands, and Back To The Root while supporting Black-owned farms and food initiatives.

initiatives.name: Black & Beyond the Binary Collective
initiatives.description: Organization building leadership, healing, and safety for Black-African transgender, queer, nonbinary, two-spirit, and intersex (TQN2SI+) Oregonians through community support and mutual aid initiatives.

initiatives.name: Anti-Binary PDX
initiatives.description: Mutual aid collective providing direct support and resources to trans and nonbinary community members in Portland through solidarity networks and community care.

initiatives.name: Eberhardt Press
initiatives.description: Radical printing press in Portland.

initiatives.name: Kaibigan FFPS
initiatives.description: Filipino Food Pantry Seattle building international solidarity through mutual aid and community support for the Filipino diaspora.

initiatives.name: Sông2Sea
initiatives.description: Vietnamese solidarity organization fostering political education and community building through study groups, cultural projects, and mutual aid.

initiatives.name: Capybara Colectiva
initiatives.description: A militant, grassroots org of Latin American diaspora fighting and exposing the u.s. imperialism that forces migrants to leave their homelands.

initiatives.name: GABRIELA Portland
initiatives.description: Filipino women's organization building mutual aid networks and international solidarity through grassroots organizing, political education, and cultural work.

initiatives.name: Black & Pink PDX
initiatives.description: PDX org fighting for abolition of the prison industrial complex alongside incarcerated LGBTQ people✨mtgs evry 2nd thurs

initiatives.name: Everly Project
initiatives.description: We provide syringe services, Narcan, and other crucial supplies, and run non-traditional recovery groups.

initiatives.name:
MERP (Munincipal Eco-Resiliency Project)
              Multnomah
initiatives.description: We're about expanding grassroots power & attaining sustainable resources w/ marginalized communities to build food sovereignty 4 climate justice.

initiatives.name: Street Books
initiatives.description: Mobile library & community gathering space for people who live outside: books, glasses, essential needs, & harm reduction.

initiatives.name: Portland Mutual Aid Network
initiatives.description: We are an all-volunteer mutual aid group distributing food, survival supplies, and personal care products weekly.
